Stop wasting time driving around. Find your next great location in minutes.

Tired of guessing which spots will actually work? Get instant access to real foot traffic data, competition analysis, and location intelligence that helps you find placements your competitors don't know about. Start searching right away - no waiting, no hassle.

Why operators sign up

  • See real foot traffic before you commit

    Stop guessing if a location will work. Get actual visitor counts, peak hours, and traffic patterns so you know exactly what you're getting into before you sign a lease.

  • Find spots your competitors miss

    Our data reveals hidden gems - locations with high traffic but low competition. These are the placements that turn into your best performers.

  • Save hours of driving around

    No more wasting weekends scouting locations that don't pan out. Search from your desk, see the data, and only visit spots that actually make sense.

"I found a spot at a suburban hospital I never would have even considered. The foot traffic data showed it was perfect, and now it's my highest-grossing machine. This tool paid for itself in the first month."

— Maya Collins, Coastline Vending
